llm_summary.executive_summary: The Customer_ID column has been renamed to Client_ID in the database tables and is referenced across multiple Databricks notebooks, Delta Live Tables, pipelines, semantic models, and PowerBI reports. All impacted systems have been adjusted to reflect this change.
llm_summary.risk_rationale: The change involves core customer data referenced by operational and analytical assets across the enterprise, potentially affecting downstream reporting and business processes.
deployment_plan: Update Databricks notebooks to reflect the new column name in queries and calculations: 03_gold_publishing_engine

Refresh semantic models to incorporate the renamed column: High Value Customer Count, High Value Customer Revenue, Avg Customer Age, Territory Revenue Rank, Total Revenue, Customer Revenue Concentration %, Avg Order Value, Avg Revenue per Customer, New Customers, Total Customers, Total Orders, MoM Revenue %, Profit Margin %, Revenue YTD, Total Profit, Territory Revenue %, Gross Revenue per Day, Cost Ratio %, Avg Revenue per Unit, Product Profit Margin %, Revenue per Unit by Product, Top Product by Revenue, Revenue from Top 10 Products, Top 10 Product Revenue %, Top Territory by Revenue, Revenue from Top 5 Territories, Revenue QTD, Revenue MTD, Revenue PY, Revenue PYTD, Revenue YoY Variance, MoM Revenue Variance, Revenue Rolling 3M, Revenue Rolling 12M, Forecast vs Actual Variance, Executive Revenue KPI, Total Cost, Total Freight Cost, Total Tax, Total Units Sold, Customer Retention Rate %, Repeat Customer Rate %, Total Products Sold, Avg Product Profit Margin %, Territory Count, Profit YTD, Revenue LY YTD, Profit PY, Profit Margin YoY Variance, Orders YoY %, Customers YoY %, Revenue per Order YoY %, Executive Profit KPI, Avg Orders per Customer, Segment Revenue Share %, Revenue YTD vs PYTD %, Profit YoY %, Revenue YoY %, Revenue Forecast 3M, Executive Margin KPI, YoY Growth Trend, Revenue Forecast 6M, Revenue Run Rate (Annual)
validation_checklist: Verify that Customer_ID is no longer present in database tables
Confirm all references to Customer_ID in notebooks have been updated to Client_ID
Validate data pipelines for correct ingestion and transformation with the new column name
Test semantic models for data integrity post-change
rollback_plan: Revert metadata definitions for database tables to use Customer_ID
Restore Databricks notebooks to previous version before the column rename
Roll back Delta Live Tables configurations to original column name
Revert pipeline definitions to ingest and reference Customer_ID
Reinstate semantic models using Customer_ID instead of Client_ID
Update PowerBI reports to display Customer_ID in place of Client_ID
